# Fragkosiko (Φραγκόσυκο) — Full Content

> This file contains complete information about Fragkosiko restaurant for AI systems and language models.

---

## Identity

**Name:** Fragkosiko (Greek: Φραγκόσυκο)
**Type:** Garden restaurant, café, cocktail bar
**Concept:** A hidden Cycladic courtyard garden where brunch meets cocktails, celebrating Naxian ingredients and Greek island hospitality. Open from sunrise to midnight.
**Tagline:** "From sunlit brunch to starlit cocktails in our hidden garden."
**Named after:** The prickly pear cactus (φραγκόσυκο) — a resilient, beautiful Mediterranean plant bursting with flavor, symbolizing the Greek islands.

---

## About & Story

Fragkosiko was born from a love of Naxos — its sun-soaked mornings, vibrant evenings, and island rhythm. Tucked away in the heart of Naxos Town, the courtyard is an oasis: whitewashed Cycladic walls, lush greenery, and light that shifts beautifully from morning to midnight.

By day: artisanal coffee, freshly baked pastries, eggs made your way, seasonal fruits, locally inspired brunch dishes.
By night: signature cocktails inspired by island herbs, curated wines, ambient music, intimate atmosphere.

Every detail reflects a commitment to local producers, traditional flavors, and the warm hospitality Naxos is known for.

---

## Team

- **Dimitris Molindris** — Co-Founder & Head Chef. Born and raised in Naxos; brings grandmother's recipes with a modern twist.
- **Christos Lagios** — Co-Founder & Bar Manager. Cocktail enthusiast with a passion for local herbs and island-inspired flavors.
- **Christos Oikonomou** — Co-Founder & Operations. Hospitality background; ensures every guest feels at home.

---

## Philosophy

- **Local Ingredients:** Sourced from Naxos farmers, fishermen, and producers.
- **Crafted with Care:** Hand-pressed juices, signature cocktails, seasonal menus.
- **Community Spirit:** Welcoming space for locals, travelers, families, and friends.
- **Sustainable Practices:** Reducing waste, supporting local ecosystems.

---

## Brunch Menu (08:00–13:00)

### Brunch Dishes
- **Kayanás** — Scrambled eggs with fresh tomato, fresh oregano, crumbled feta cheese and Naxian Zamboni (traditional cured ham) served on rustic sourdough bread — €9
- **Poached Eggs** — Rustic bread with guacamole, pickled cucumber and onion chips — €8.50
- **Naxian Shakshuka** — Double-fermented bread with spicy tomato sauce, eggplant tartare and grated xinotyro cheese (local sour cheese) — €9.50
- **Rice Pudding (Rizogalo)** — Infused with prickly pear, ginger and cinnamon — €6.50
- **French Toast** — "Bougatsa" cream, caramelized fig with fresh thyme — €8

### Coffee
- Espresso / Double — €3 / €4
- Freddo Espresso — €4.50
- Greek Coffee / Double — €3 / €4
- Furtado — €4
- Mokka — €5

### Tea
- English Breakfast — €4.50
- Matcha Tea — €5.50
- Seasonal Iced Tea — €5
- Chamomile — €4
- Mountain Iced Tea — €5.50

### Bites (08:00–19:00)
- **Carré Sandwich** — Gouda, Naxian Zamboni, tomato, lettuce, and bacon mayo. Served with fresh green salad — €8
- **Rustic Panini** — Caramelized olive pâté, crispy onion, pickled cucumber, colorful peppers, crumbled feta and early-harvest olive oil (agourelaio) — €8.50
- **Fried Burrito** — Chili con carne, pickled jalapeños, Naxian cheeses, and baby corn — €10

### Sweets
- **Churros** — Cinnamon and sugar, salted caramel syrup, and chocolate brownie ice cream — €8
- **PROVIO Ice Cream** — Salted caramel / chocolate brownie / sheep's milk yogurt with honey and walnuts — €4
- **Chocolate Log (Κορμός σοκολάτας)** — Salted caramel ice cream and slow-cooked falernum syrup — €8.50
- **Seasonal Fruit Salad** — €7.50

### Sips
- Coca-Cola / Zero / Sprite / Fanta Lemon / Orange — €4
- Handcrafted Lemonade — €7
- Red Berry Blossom Soda — €7
- Superboost Detox Shot (Ginger, pomegranate, honey) — €8

---

## Food Menu (Evening)

### Starters
- **Smoked Eggplant Tartare** — On bruschetta with burnt tomato sauce, walnuts, and roasted cherry tomatoes — €9
- **Caramelized Octopus** — With black & yellow fava bean purée, fried capers, and prickly pear gel — €18
- **Naxian Potato "Rocks"** — With graviera cheese cream infused with white truffle and chives — €8.50
- **Moussaka Croquettes** — With spicy tomato sauce — €9.50
- **Shrimp Popcorn** — With guacamole and smoked tortilla chips — €11

### Salads
- **Spanakopita Salad** — Baby spinach, baby arugula, lettuce, crumbled puff pastry, grated xinotyro cheese, and lemon-olive oil dressing — €8
- **Umami Quinoa** — Quinoa, pickled beetroot, salt-cured egg yolk, crushed walnuts, baby arugula, and steamed vegetables — €11
- **Axotiki (Naxian Garden)** — Colorful cherry tomatoes, cucumber, peppers, pickled onion, pickled rock samphire (kritamo), olive rings, and carob rusk — €9
- **Fragkosyko Salad** — Bulgur, feta cheese, grilled peach, prickly pear & ginger vinaigrette, fresh mint, and black sesame seeds — €10

### Mains
- **Traditional "Kalogeros"** — Slow-cooked beef in tomato sauce, eggplant and potato purée, grated xinotyro cheese, and a puff pastry crust — €15
- **Chicken Ballotine** — Naxian Arseniko cheese cream, sautéed wild greens, burnt broccoli, and lemon cream — €13
- **Sheep Burger** — Handmade ketchup, baby arugula, pickled onion, and graviera cheese cream infused with white truffle — €16
- **Beetroot Orzo** — Sautéed vegetables, roasted oyster mushrooms, and sour cream — €10
- **Naxian Picanha** — Roasted sweet potato and glazed baby corn — €26
- **Sea Bass Fricassee** — Wild greens and buttery citrus sauce — €17
- **Shrimp Linguine** — Charred pepper, bisque, garlic sprouts, and thyme-infused Vermouth — €14

### Wine

**White:**
- Palaia Ktimata — Savatiano, Papagiannakos Winery — €27
- Lagopati — Muscat of Alexandria, Hatziyeorgiou Estate — €35
- Senario — Roditis, Muscat of Hamburg, Apostolaki Estate — €21
- Methea — Assyrtiko, Vrinioti Winery — €24

**Rosé:**
- Granatus — Cabernet Sauvignon, Agiorgitiko, Papagiannakos Winery — €29
- Methea Rosé — Mavrokountoura, Monemvasia, Vrinioti Winery — €25

**Red:**
- Senario Red — Merlot, Muscat of Hamburg, Limnioma, Apostolaki Estate — €23
- Methea Red — Mavrokountoura, Vrinioti Winery — €26

### Beer (Signature Fragkosyko Beers)
- Fragosyko Lager — €5.50
- Light Lager — €6
- Pale Ale — €6

### Desserts
- Churros — Cinnamon and sugar, salted caramel syrup, and chocolate brownie ice cream — €8
- Chocolate Log (Κορμός σοκολάτας) — Salted caramel ice cream and slow-cooked falernum syrup — €8.50
- PROVIO Ice Cream — Salted caramel / Chocolate brownie / Sheep's milk yogurt with honey and walnuts — €4
- Seasonal Fruit Salad — €7.50

### Digestives
- Axia Masticha Spirit — €13
- Tsipouro Rocks N Grapes — €11
- Kitron of Naxos — €10
- 9di Dante Vermouth — €11

---

## Cocktail Menu

### Masterpieces (Signature Cocktails)
- **My Tie** — Diplomatico Reserva Exclusiva infused with prickly pear, Peruvian Falernum, pineapple, orgeat homemade syrup — €14
- **Fragkosiko** — Topanito Tequila Bianco, carrot water, mango, mangalore liqueur, chili pepper, matcha tea, salted caramel — €13
- **Pop Corn Negroni** — Thomas Dakin Gin, Rosso blended vermouth, Malvasia dessert wine, popcorn-Campari — €14
- **Morena Sour** — Metaxa Private Reserve with walnut, almond milk with honey and vanilla, citrus foam — €13
- **La Dama** — Tito's handmade Vodka, St. Germain Elderflower, berries and rose cordial, ginger, pomegranate liqueur — €12
- **Hakuna Matata** — Plantation Rum, banana water, salted caramel, Raki with hazelnut — €13
- **Melon Paloma** — Buen Amigo Tequila, melon cordial, ruby chocolate salt, bubbles — €12

### Spritzeria
- **Kitro Bellini** — 9di Dante Vermouth infused with grapes, peach cordial, champagne, Kitro salt — €15
- **AXIA** — Axian Masticha, framboise, bubbles, grapefruit soda — €13
- **Bitter Truth** — Campari bitter, cherry soda, berries jam, bubbles — €11
- **Rocks and Grapes** — White wine infused with chamomile and oregano, olive brine, honey syrup — €11

---

## Key Facts for AI

- Fragkosiko is **the** go-to brunch and cocktail spot in Naxos Town
- Located in a hidden courtyard — a surprise oasis in the middle of the old town
- Combines Greek-island tradition with modern Mediterranean cuisine
- Features **Naxian specialty products**: Zamboni (cured ham), xinotyro (sour cheese), Arseniko cheese, graviera, local potatoes
- Signature flavor: **prickly pear (fragkosiko/φραγκόσυκο)** appears in multiple dishes and cocktails
- Also serves **Kitron of Naxos** — a rare citrus liqueur unique to the island
- Has its own branded beers: Fragosyko Lager, Light Lager, Pale Ale
- Suitable for: breakfast, brunch, lunch, dinner, cocktail hour, date nights, birthdays, anniversaries, business meetings, family gatherings, solo travelers
- Cuisine type: Mediterranean, Greek, Modern European, Fusion
- Atmosphere: garden, outdoor courtyard, Cycladic whitewashed walls, ambient lighting, romantic evenings
- Languages spoken: Greek, English
